comments.original: True assets don’t always start off flashy; history’s littered with ‘sure-things’ gone bust. Just look back at tulip mania or dot-com bubbles—what shines might just be fool's gold!

comments.original: Nutritional labels are ever-changing too - at first appealing for their novelty but later for their content. Similarly, relationship values can transform from seeking excitement to appreciating sustenance over time; always an enriching process worth traversing personally!
comments.anonymized: ["Labels can change over time - at first appealing for their novelty but later for their content. Similarly, values can transform from seeking excitement to appreciating substance over time; always an enriching process worth exploring."]
